message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title SeismicAttributeType Outgoing Relationships View

skinparam shadowing false
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam roundcorner 10
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

skinparam class {
  BorderColor #1a1a1a
  FontColor #000000
}

' Colors approximating the diagram
skinparam classBackgroundColor<<reference-data>> #43E0D3
skinparam classBackgroundColor<<Abstraction>> #8FD3FF
skinparam classBackgroundColor<<nested array>> #FFFFFF
skinparam classBackgroundColor<<master-data>> #F6A07A

' Top reference data relationships box
class "«reference-data»\nReference Data Relationships\n\n\"data.NameAlias[].AliasNameTypeID\" → AliasNameType\n\"data.NameAlias[].DefinitionOrganisationID\" → StandardsOrganisation" as RefRels <<reference-data>>

' Main classes
class "«reference-data»\nSeismicAttributeType" as SeismicAttributeType <<reference-data>>
class "«Abstraction»\nAbstractReferenceType" as AbstractReferenceType <<Abstraction>>
class "«nested array»\nNameAlias[]" as NameAliasArray <<nested array>>
class "«master-data»\nOrganisation" as Organisation <<master-data>>

' Relationships
SeismicAttributeType ..> RefRels

SeismicAttributeType -right-|> AbstractReferenceType

SeismicAttributeType *-- "*" NameAliasArray

NameAliasArray --> "1" Organisation : DefinitionOrganisationID

@enduml
```
